view.title: View Kingdom Web {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome carrier pigeon?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome carrier pigeon has been resent. Check your dovecote.

buyIp.title: Commission Additional Garrison Coordinates Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Tribute ({symbol}) every month as your kingdom web is tithed
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional Garrison Coordinates tribute: {symbol}{cost}/month. Are you sure you want to commission additional garrison coordinates?

migration.title: Migrate Your Kingdom Web
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Title / Pigeon Post Address / Record Number
migration.ftpUsername: FTP / Royal Control Panel Your Title
migration.ftpPassword: FTP / Royal Control Panel Secret Sigil
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the estate is live/busy with high traffic, can we set a holding page during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this estate have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also wish us to help you transfer the fiefdom name registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you wish us to revise the keep name servers as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this parchment shall open a new royal petition for our royal court to commence your migration.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to copy is large.
migration.note4: The old hosting account in the royal ledger needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on your estate while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be copied to the new hosting.
